Bit Values:
  │ 0x00  │ 0   │ None             │ No external torque request active               │
  │ 0x01  │ 1   │ Cruise Control   │ Cruise control active with valid CAN flags      │
  │ 0x02  │ 2   │ ABS/ESP          │ ABS/ESP torque intervention active              │
  │ 0x04  │ 4   │ IPS Transmission │ Transmission torque request (CAN validated)     │
  │ 0x08  │ 8   │ IPS Transmission │ Transmission request (no brake\, cruise != idle) │
  │ 0x10  │ 16  │ IPS Gear Shift   │ Transmission gear shift torque reduction        │
  │ 0x20  │ 32  │ DPM              │ Dynamic Performance Management active           │
